summary.headline: ADM announces election of Jim Collins to Board and declares dividend.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company announced the election of Jim Collins, former CEO of Corteva, to its Board of Directors, increasing the board size from 11 to 12 directors. Collins will serve until the next annual meeting or until his successor is elected. Additionally, the company declared a cash dividend of 40.0 cents per share on its common stock, marking its 363rd consecutive quarterly payment.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Declared a cash dividend of 40.0 cents per share on the company's common stock.

extraction_notes: Numbers from Exhibit 99.1; cover sheet only had Item references.
